metadata.name: neverbrith
metadata.description:
[h1]未生 / neverbrith[/h1]
《未生》是 青春啊砖在he边看月亮 制作的 The Binding of Isaac: Repentance 道具 Mod。
它添加了一组持续扩展中的自定义道具，支持 EID，并提供中文 / 英文道具文本。
[list] [*] 自定义被动道具与主动道具 [*] 围绕延迟伤害、交易房、卡牌、跟班和死亡代价的风险收益机制 [*] 中文 / 英文道具文本 [*] External Item Descriptions 支持 [/list]
[h1]当前内容[/h1]
[list] [*] 八音盒 - 强力的限时主动道具，但倒计时结束会收取致命代价。 [*] 天使盒与恶魔盒 - 围绕充能、心和交易房方向运作，并追加房间奖励。 [*] 未剪断的脐带 - 延迟本该承受的伤害，清理房间表现越好，代价越低。 [*] 剪碎的塔罗 - 将房间内的卡牌转化为宝箱房道具。 [*] 空摇篮 - 记住每层第一次受伤，并在清房后给出对应回报。 [*] 绝育证明 - 阻止敌人继续生成敌人，并反噬源头。 [*] 血颅蛊 - 献祭跟班类道具，换取永久成长。 [*] 生死一念间 - 开启整局死证试炼。 [*] 以及更多实验性道具。 [/list]
[h1]兼容性[/h1]
[list] [*] External Item Descriptions：支持中文与英文说明。 [/list]
[h1]作者[/h1]
brick（青春啊砖在he边看月亮）
[url=https://www.youtube.com/@Brickzhou]YouTube: Brickzhou[/url] Bilibili：搜索 青春啊砖在he边看月亮 [url=https://github.com/BrickAZ/neverbrith]GitHub source[/url]
------------------------------
[h1]English[/h1]
neverbrith, titled 未生 in Chinese, is a The Binding of Isaac: Repentance item mod by brick.
It adds a growing set of custom items with EID support and Chinese / English item text.
[list] [*] Custom passive and active items [*] Risk-reward effects around delayed damage, deal rooms, cards, familiars, and death [*] Chinese / English item text [*] External Item Descriptions support [/list]
[h1]Current Content[/h1]
[list] [*] Musicbox - a powerful timed active item with a deadly debt. [*] Angelbox and Devilbox - charge-driven deal-room direction items with extra rewards. [*] Uncut Cord - delays incoming damage and lets skilled play reduce the debt. [*] Shredded Tarot - turns card pickups into Treasure Room item pedestals. [*] Empty Cradle - remembers the first hurt of each floor and pays it back after the room is cleared. [*] Sterilization Certificate - suppresses enemy-spawning enemies and punishes the source. [*] Blood Skull Gu - sacrifices familiar items for permanent growth. [*] Between Death and Life - starts a Death Certificate trial for the rest of the run. [*] Essential Balm, Wuhu, Aphrodisiac, and more experimental items. [/list]
[h1]Compatibility[/h1]
[list] [*] External Item Descriptions: supported in Chinese and English. [/list]
[h1]Author[/h1]
brick（青春啊砖在he边看月亮）
[url=https://www.youtube.com/@Brickzhou]YouTube: Brickzhou[/url] Bilibili: search 青春啊砖在he边看月亮 [url=https://github.com/BrickAZ/neverbrith]GitHub source[/url]
